meaning: n.粗鲁无礼的人,野蛮人adj.野蛮的,粗鲁的
examples: Mr Murdoch is a barbarian at the gates indeed.
The first trailer is out for the "Conan the Barbarian" reboot.

Its early titles included Barbarian and Shadow of the Beast for the Amiga and Atari ST.
The role of a virile, axe-wielding, fur-bearing, cranium-smashing barbarian suited Schwarzenegger to a tee.
